test.create_query: CREATE TABLE limit_by_in_pk_order_int (a Int32, b UInt32, c UInt32, z UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (a, b, c)
CREATE TABLE limit_by_in_pk_order_dt (a DateTime, b UInt32, z UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (a, b)
CREATE TABLE limit_by_in_pk_order_low (a UInt8, b UInt32, c UInt32, z UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (a, b, c)
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_int SELECT number % 100000, number % 97, number % 7, number FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_int SELECT number % 100000, number % 97, number % 7, number FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_dt SELECT toDateTime(number % 100000), number % 97, number FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_dt SELECT toDateTime(number % 100000), number % 97, number FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_low SELECT number % 5, intDiv(number, 5), number % 7, number FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_low SELECT number % 5, intDiv(number, 5), number % 7, number FROM numbers(5000000)
test.query: SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_int LIMIT 5 BY a FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_int LIMIT 5 BY a, b FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_int LIMIT 5 BY a, b, c FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_low WHERE a = 1 LIMIT 5 BY b FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_int WHERE z > 5 LIMIT 5 BY a FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_dt LIMIT 5 BY toStartOfHour(a) FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_int LIMIT 5 BY negate(a) FORMAT NULL
SELECT a, b, c, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_int LIMIT 5 OFFSET 2 BY a FORMAT NULL
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE limit_by_in_pk_order_multi_part (a UInt32, b UInt32, z UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY a PARTITION BY b % 16
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO limit_by_in_pk_order_multi_part SELECT number % 100000, number, number FROM numbers(16000000)
test.query: SELECT a, b, z FROM limit_by_in_pk_order_multi_part LIMIT 5 BY a FORMAT NULL
